name: Derived Analytics & Live Screening

validation_results.ci_product_ci_and_validate_pos: never triggered (no matching path filters touched this sprint)

live_validation_results_per_symbol.environment: Railway ASA production service, real Tradier credentials
live_validation_results_per_symbol.execution_method: railway run -- python -m screening --live --json (credential values never read or handled by the implementing agent)

request_budget_evidence.budget_manager_sharing: one RequestBudgetManager instance shared across every enabled provider's dependencies for the whole run
request_budget_evidence.verified_by: tests/screening/test_cli.py::TestLive (network-free injected transport, no real credentials needed to prove this behavior)

discovered_and_resolved_defects.description: _acquire_or_raise let a raw DomainInvariantError escape as STRATEGY_EXCEPTION instead of the documented MISSING_DATA contract when no enabled provider declares a requested capability at all
market_data/live_transport.py initially written inside screening/, violating screening/'s own no-network-import architecture boundary

recommendations_for_sprint_008: resolve issue #156 (Tradier two-step expiration-then-chain acquisition) and confirm earnings_calendar's separate live-acquisition failure before treating any target strategy as genuinely live-signal-capable
once #156 is fixed, re-run python -m screening --live against the same six-symbol validation universe and confirm at least one real PASS/NO_SIGNAL verdict per strategy
decide the Opportunity/ranking bridge (deferred since SPRINT-006's #143 decision) now that live signals are close to real
address issue #147 (CI coverage) as a Founder-reviewed .github/workflows/ change
